payload.answer: Classified as contextual article/guidance source text. No durable personal memory facts should be committed from this input.
citations: For context, AI memory systems need durable source evidence. Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable. A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.
